content.text:
Searching the web.

<tool_call>
{"arguments":{"query":"用 websearch 搜索今天的 AI 产品新闻，给我 3 条，附来源链接。"},"name":"web_search"}
</tool_call>

Searched: AI product news March 30 2026 site:openai.com OR site:anthropic.com OR site:googleblog.com OR site:techcrunch.com OR site:theverge.com OR site:blog.google products AI March 30 2026

<tool_call>
{"arguments":{"queries":["AI product news March 30 2026 site:openai.com OR site:anthropic.com OR site:googleblog.com OR site:techcrunch.com OR site:theverge.com OR site:blog.google products AI March 30 2026","today AI product news March 30 2026 TechCrunch Verge product launch AI","March 2026 AI product launch official blog OpenAI Anthropic Google AI product"],"query":"AI product news March 30 2026 site:openai.com OR site:anthropic.com OR site:googleblog.com OR site:techcrunch.com OR site:theverge.com OR site:blog.google products AI March 30 2026"},"name":"web_search"}
</tool_call>

Searched: site:openai.com/index March 2026 product OpenAI

<tool_call>
{"arguments":{"queries":["site:openai.com/index March 2026 product OpenAI","site:www.anthropic.com/news March 2026 product","site:blog.google technology ai March 2026 product"],"query":"site:openai.com/index March 2026 product OpenAI"},"name":"web_search"}
</tool_call>

Searched: site:anthropic.com/news March 2026 Claude product release

<tool_call>
{"arguments":{"queries":["site:anthropic.com/news March 2026 Claude product release","site:blog.google/technology/ai March 2026 Gemini release","site:blogs.microsoft.com March 2026 Copilot product AI","site:perplexity.ai/hub March 2026 product launch AI"],"query":"site:anthropic.com/news March 2026 Claude product release"},"name":"web_search"}
</tool_call>

Searched: AI product launch March 29 2026 site:techcrunch.com

<tool_call>
{"arguments":{"queries":["AI product launch March 29 2026 site:techcrunch.com","AI product launch March 30 2026 site:theverge.com","AI product news March 30 2026 site:venturebeat.com AI product","AI product news March 30 2026 site:blog.google OR site:openai.com OR site:anthropic.com"],"query":"AI product launch March 29 2026 site:techcrunch.com"},"name":"web_search"}
</tool_call>

截至今天 **2026-03-30**，我查到最近较值得关注的 3 条 **AI 产品新闻**：

1. **OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.4**
   - **日期**：2026-03-05
   - **看点**：GPT-5.4 同时上线 **ChatGPT、API 和 Codex**，主打更强的专业工作能力，覆盖推理、编码、工具调用和 agentic workflows。
   - **来源**：OpenAI  
     https://openai.com/index/introducing-gpt-5-4/

2. **Google 为 Docs / Sheets / Slides / Drive 推出更多 Gemini 功能**
   - **日期**：2026-03-10
   - **看点**：Google 给 Workspace 加了更多 Gemini 能力，比如基于文件、邮件和网页生成草稿、做数据整理、生成演示内容，以及在 Drive 里做更复杂的信息检索与问答。
   - **来源**：Google Blog  
     https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/workspace/gemini-workspace-updates-march-2026/

3. **Microsoft 发布 Microsoft 365 Copilot Wave 3，并公布 Agent 365**
   - **日期**：2026-03-09
   - **看点**：Microsoft 宣布 **Agent 365** 将于 **2026-05-01** 正式可用，同时在 Copilot 中强化 agent 能力，并强调支持更丰富的模型选择。
   - **来源**：Microsoft Official Blog  
     https://blogs.microsoft.com/blog/2026/03/09/introducing-the-first-frontier-suite-built-on-intelligence-trust/

如果你愿意，我可以继续帮你整理成：
- **“更偏消费端” 3 条**
- **“更偏开发者/API” 3 条**
- **“更偏大厂对比” 3 条**
